user.title: Nedap PowerRouter
user.description: Configure the HTTP receiver for Nedap PowerRouters. Multiple PowerRouters in the same network are automatically discovered. Data can optionally be forwarded to the real Nedap server.

data_description.port: Port the HTTP server listens on (default: 8099). Must match your Docker port mapping.
data_description.forward_enabled: When enabled, received data is additionally sent to the real Nedap server.
data_description.forward_ip: The real IP address of logging1.powerrouter.com. Find with: dig @8.8.8.8 logging1.powerrouter.com +short

abort.already_configured: Integration is already configured. Only one instance is needed – multiple PowerRouters are automatically discovered.
